titles.ar: باب الْوَصِيِّ يُدْرِكُ أَيْتَامُهُ فَيَمْتَنِعُونَ مِنْ أَخْذِ مَالِهِمْ وَ مَنْ يُدْرِكُ وَ لَا يُؤْنَسُ مِنْهُ الرُّشْدُ وَ حَدِّ الْبُلُوغِ
titles.en: Chapter 39 – The executor, orphans (under his care) become adults, but they shy away from taking their wealth, and the one who is an adult does not have the understanding of the guidance, and the limit of the adulthood

text: تَمَّ كِتَابُ الْوَصَايَا وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ وَ صَلَوَاتُهُ عَلَى خَيْرِ خَلْقِهِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَ يَتْلُوهُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى كِتَابُ الْمَوَارِيثِ .

en.hubeali: The Book of the Bequests is complete; and the Praise is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Lord<sup>azwj</sup> of the Worlds, and His<sup>azwj</sup> Blessing be upon the best of His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures, and his<sup>saww</sup> Purified Progeny<sup>asws</sup>, and it will be followed, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Willing, by the Book of the Inheritance.
